title: Spicy Bouncy-Qq Date-Night Saudi-Arabian Butter Bake
description: A sweet and savory Saudi-Arabian dish featuring butter, perfect for a date night.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the coconut milk, cardamom, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
Add the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) to the butter mixture and mix until just combined.
Pour in the coconut mixture and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Add the ghee and mix until well combined.
Stir in the dried dates and orange blossom water.
Pour the batter into a greased skillet or baking dish and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove the bake from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with chopped nuts or dried rose petals if desired.
This dish is best served with a dollop of whipped cream or a sprinkle of powdered sugar.
Enjoy your delicious Spicy Bouncy-Qq Date-Night Saudi-Arabian Butter Bake!
Baking time may vary depending on your oven's temperature and the size of your skillet or baking dish.
